title: Smoky Tender Ukrainian Beef Stew
description: A savory one‑pot Ukrainian beef stew with a silky vanilla custard drizzle, caramelized onions, and a smoky hint of paprika, all while staying keto friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium‑high heat and sear beef cubes until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add diced onion and minced garlic; cook, stirring, until onions are translucent and beginning to caramelize, 4-5 minutes.
Stir in smoked paprika and rosemary, cooking for 1 minute to release the spices.
Pour in beef broth, cover, and bring to a simmer; reduce heat to low and let the stew cook for 60 minutes, uncovered, until beef is tender.
Meanwhile, whisk together heavy cream, egg yolks, vanilla extract, and powdered erythritol in a bowl until smooth.
Once the beef is tender, remove the pot from heat and slowly pour the custard mixture into the stew, whisking constantly to prevent curdling.
Return the pot to low heat and stir until the custard thickens slightly, 5-7 minutes; the sauce should coat the beef and vegetables.
Season the stew with additional salt and pepper to taste and stir well.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh parsley or a sprinkle of smoked paprika for extra aroma.
Enjoy the smoky, creamy richness of this keto‑friendly Ukrainian beef stew!
